name: 隱藏身份的契約婚姻→真愛
name_en: Hidden Identity Marriage Turning Into True Love
description: 男女主各自隱藏真實身份，從初遇衝突到互相吸引，到結婚後才逐漸揭露彼此的真正背景。衝突核心在於信任——隱瞞是否等於欺騙？揭露後能否接受？

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Honey, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have hidden my real identity from you. / President Hua didn't tell you because he didn't want you to get dragged into the toxic face cream case. He said, 'You're a princess. You shouldn't have to worry about these things.'
examples.context: 男女主各自隱藏真實身份，從初遇衝突到互相吸引，到結婚後才逐漸揭露彼此的真正背景。衝突核心在於信任——隱瞞是否等於欺騙？揭露後能否接受？
